title: Fix cross-server import in physician-referral-network
description: physician_mix.py:173-178 imports from servers.health_system_profiler.data_loaders - fails in standalone mode. Makes analyze_physician_mix and detect_leakage non-functional. Move to shared/ package.

title: Hardcoded CMS URLs will rot when new data releases publish
description: 11/13 servers have CMS download URLs with date-specific paths/UUIDs that break on new releases. Need URL discovery layer querying CMS data catalog API with hardcoded fallback.

title: Return structured MCP tool results instead of JSON strings
description: Most tools return json.dumps(...) strings and encode errors as successful text payloads. Migrate high-value tools to typed dict/Pydantic returns where FastMCP can emit structuredContent/output schemas, and raise tool errors for invalid inputs/runtime failures.
close_reason: Migrated tool servers to FastMCP structured output, added shared response helpers, updated stale tests, and verified structured schemas across launcher modules.

title: Add remote MCP gateway with auth for OpenAI and Claude connectors
description: Current servers are local stdio/local HTTP only. Add a production remote MCP gateway with HTTPS, OAuth/auth, origin validation, scoped access, and OpenAI-compatible search/fetch where datasets are used as retrievable knowledge.
close_reason: Implemented local-safe remote MCP gateway skeleton with auth/origin helpers, OpenAI-compatible search/fetch metadata tools, security docs, and focused auth tests.

title: Hardening pass for MCP packaging, bugs, and agent best practices
description: Audit healthcare-data-mcp for bugs, repo organization, MCP packaging/client best practices, and model-friendly tool design. Implement scoped fixes and document remaining follow-up work.
close_reason: Implemented hardening pass: package build, launcher/docs, missing shared helpers/deps, local bind defaults, cleanup, and validation.

title: Prepare repository metadata for public release
description: Public release readiness work covering repository metadata and baseline community docs that are currently missing from the checked-out branch. Add release-facing files such as README, LICENSE, CONTRIBUTING, SECURITY, and package metadata needed for GitHub and PyPI-style presentation.

title: Universal MCP client installation configs
description: Create ready-to-use configs for Claude Code (.mcp.json), OpenCode, Codex CLI, OpenClaw. One-command install scripts, Docker and pip options. Trivially easy setup.

title: Create comprehensive README.md
description: No README at project root. Need: overview, architecture diagram, per-server tool list, install instructions (pip/Docker/MCP configs), API key setup guide, dev workflow.

title: Add unit tests for 12 untested servers
description: Only health-system-profiler has pytest coverage. Other 12 servers have zero unit tests. Need mocked pytest suites for all, priority on servers with external API deps.

title: Thread safety: add asyncio.Lock to global DataFrame caches
description: data_loaders.py:36-38 uses global DataFrames as cache with no locking. Concurrent MCP requests race on global writes under SSE transport.

title: Fix USAspending fiscal year calculation bug
description: usaspending_client.py:28 uses datetime.now().year as FY but federal FY runs Oct-Sep. In April 2026 it searches FY2027 instead of FY2026.

title: Fix SEC EDGAR User-Agent placeholder email
description: edgar_client.py:14 defaults to support@example.com. SEC blocks fake addresses. Remove default, raise error at startup if not set.

title: Fix f-string SQL injection in DuckDB view creation
description: 6 servers construct DuckDB SQL with f-strings for Parquet paths. Use parameterized path syntax instead. Affects: price-transparency, workforce-analytics, claims-analytics, public-records, web-intelligence, geo-demographics.

title: Add HTTP retry/backoff to all 13 servers
description: No server implements retry logic. CMS returns 503s during maintenance. Add tenacity or manual exponential backoff with jitter.

title: Add cache TTL to 9 servers missing it
description: Only geo-demographics has 90-day cache TTL. Other 9 servers cache data forever. CMS updates quarterly. Port geo-demographics pattern to all.

title: Implement HHS OIG LEIE exclusions tooling
description: Implement the LEIE tooling described in docs/plans/2026-04-23-hhs-oig-leie-exclusions-tooling.md: cache UPDATED.csv, add structured public-records tools, discovery metadata, and focused tests.
design: Use the existing public-records server rather than a new server. Canonical source is https://oig.hhs.gov/exclusions/downloadables/UPDATED.csv cached as public-records/leie_current.parquet with metadata. Do not automate SSN/EIN verification or use verify=False for TLS.
acceptance_criteria: LEIE cache metadata and Parquet loader are implemented; public-records exposes NPI, individual, entity, batch, and metadata tools; discovery includes hhs_oig_leie; focused pytest suite passes.

title: Plan PECOS, PLACES, NIH/ClinicalTrials, and exclusions tooling
description: Investigate target public data sources and current MCP server architecture, then produce an implementation plan for adding provider enrollment/ownership, community health, research/trials, and exclusion screening tooling.

title: Plan HHS OIG LEIE exclusions tooling
description: Investigate HHS OIG LEIE data sources and local MCP server patterns, then write a durable implementation plan for adding exclusions tooling.
close_reason: Plan written at docs/plans/2026-04-23-hhs-oig-leie-exclusions-tooling.md and implementation follow-up filed as HDM-1oz.

title: Package Claude Desktop MCPB and Codex config examples
description: Add distributable Claude Desktop .mcpb metadata/build flow and checked-in sample Codex MCP config snippets so clients do not have to infer install modes from README text.
close_reason: Added Claude Desktop stdio examples, Codex config examples, and MCPB packaging skeleton/build script.

title: Add MCP resources and prompts for dataset discovery
description: Repo is tools-only. Add resources for dataset catalog, schemas, source URLs, cache status, and setup runbooks, plus prompt templates for common healthcare market-analysis workflows.
close_reason: Added metadata-only discovery server with dataset resources, cache status, prompts, launcher/Docker/client wiring, docs, and tests.

title: Verify ProPublica field mapping in financial-intelligence
description: server.py:72 assigns total_expenses from revenue_amount and total_revenue from income_amount. May be swapped. Verify against ProPublica API docs.

title: Geo-demographics batch fetches all 33K ZCTAs unnecessarily
description: census_client.py:237-244 for batches >10 ZCTAs fetches ALL ~33,000 ZCTAs (~50MB). Should chunk into groups of 10 with targeted requests.

title: Create .env setup script with validation
description: No .env file exists. Add setup script: copies .env.example, validates keys, reports degraded servers, optionally prompts for entry.

title: Add CI/CD pipeline with GitHub Actions
description: No CI/CD exists. Need GitHub Actions: ruff lint, type check, unit tests with mock APIs, smoke tests, Docker build verification.
notes: CI exists (.github/workflows/ci.yml) but needs type checking + broader unit test coverage

title: Extend smoke tests to cover all 13 servers
description: smoke_test.py only covers original 7 servers. 6 newer servers have zero coverage: health-system-profiler, physician-referral-network, workforce-analytics, claims-analytics, public-records, web-intelligence.

title: Google CSE quota management for web-intelligence
description: 100 queries/day free. Single analysis burns 10-15. Need batching, alternative search backends, exponential backoff, per-session quota counter.

title: Add MRF disk space guard for price-transparency
description: MRF files 1-10 GB. No Content-Length check, no max size, no progress. Add configurable max (10 GB default).

title: Wire up HSA crosswalk for leakage detection
description: detect_leakage hard-codes out_of_network_in_area_pct to 0.0. HSA crosswalk infrastructure exists but never called. Wire it up.

title: DocGraph data requires manual loading for physician-referral-network
description: map_referral_network and detect_leakage gated behind manual CSV load. 2 of 5 tools non-functional for new installs. Expose as MCP tool or automate.

title: Missing ACGME static data file for workforce-analytics
description: data/ contains only .gitkeep. get_residency_programs is non-functional. Bundle data, provide download script, or scrape ACGME at startup.

title: Extract duplicate utility code into shared module
description: Functions _is_cache_valid, _get_con, _detect_columns, _find_col, _s, get_cache_path reimplemented identically across servers. Extract to shared/utils/. Also consolidate duplicate os imports.

title: Connection pooling for httpx across all servers
description: Every API call creates new httpx.AsyncClient. Web-intelligence makes 2-4 per tool. Add shared session with connection pooling.

title: Expand GPO directory in web-intelligence
description: gpo_directory.csv only 578 bytes (~5-6 GPOs). Healthcare has dozens (Vizient, Premier, HealthTrust, Intalere, HPG, etc.). Expand to all major GPOs.

title: Duplicate get_hospital_info and get_facility in cms-facility
description: Both do identical CCN lookup returning Facility model. Remove one or differentiate.

title: Unused complications data loader in hospital-quality
description: data_loaders.py:80-83 load_complications() defined but no tool uses it. Wire up or remove.

title: Hospital General Info downloaded independently by 3 servers
description: service-area, drive-time, cms-facility each download/cache hospital_general_info.csv independently. Consolidate to shared cache.

title: Deduplicate financial profile logic between hospital-quality and cms-facility
description: Both implement get_facility_financials from same Cost Report with nearly identical code. Extract to shared/.

title: include_projections parameter is no-op in workforce-analytics
description: server.py:45 accepts include_projections: bool but it is never used. Either implement or remove.
